title: LLMUsageNormalized
description: F008 canonical normalized usage event. Cost in integer USD minor units (1 unit = 0.01 USD). LLM payload fields are forbidden.

event_id.description: Globally unique event identifier (UUIDv7 recommended). Idempotency key.

source_event_id.description: event_id of the originating raw event (e.g. llm.usage.raw.<provider>).

source_mode.description: Whether telemetry came from a billing-API poller (pull) or gateway (proxy).

source.description: Discriminator for which surface produced this event. exporter=upstream llm-usage-exporter (pull/billing); gateway=in-repo proxy (runtime); sdk=in-process SDK (runtime); otel=OTel Collector receiver.

provider.description: Canonical provider identifier; extended by future providers.

tenant.description: Tenant identifier. Mandatory on every event.

input_tokens.description: Input/prompt token count. Integer, never null.

output_tokens.description: Output/completion token count. Integer, never null.

cost_usd_minor_units.description: Cost in USD minor units (1 unit = 0.01 USD). Integer per F008 §10.

request_count.description: Number of provider requests aggregated into this event.

period_start.description: Start of the aggregation window (RFC3339 / ISO 8601).

period_end.description: End of the aggregation window (RFC3339 / ISO 8601).

normalized_at.description: When the normalizer produced this canonical event.

request_id_hash.description: SHA-256 of the original request ID. Never the raw ID.
